name: Bangkok Ranch Public Company Limited
summary: Bangkok Ranch Public Company Limited produces and supplies duck meat products in Thailand and internationally. It provides duck portions, including breast fillets, drumsticks, and wings; and by-products. The company also offers pre-cooked products for the fast preparation of meals by food service chains, such as roast duck and smoked duck meat; and ready-made consumer products for supermarkets and retail outlets, including roasted, crispy whole duck, aromatic duck with pancakes and hoisin sauce, and duck drumsticks in orange sauce and sweet chilli sauce under the Dalee, Duck-To, and Canature brands, as well as under various private labels. In addition, it provides animal feed; and operates duck farms, hatcheries, feed mills, and distribution center. Further, the company engages in the duck slaughtering and duck meat trading businesses. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Bang Phli, Thailand.
